_publications._publicationTitle: Synergistic effect of Nutlin-3 combined with MG-132 on schwannoma cells through restoration of merlin and p53 tumour suppressors.

_contextSnippet: p53 expression was demonstrated in normal nerves (NC) and one of merlin-positive tumours (#2; lanes 2)...p53 protein was demonstrated to be up-regulated and accumulate in the nuclear extracts of Nutlin-3-treated cells
details: Successfully detected p53 expression in normal nerves and merlin-positive tumors, demonstrated p53 accumulation in nuclear extracts after Nutlin-3 treatment
